name: gate missing spring - multi-photo ambiguous, asks clarification (2026-05-23 incident)
_context: User uploaded 4 photos of a motorised wooden gate: chaotic scene with mesh+wood+ground, sideways gate with a jack and a roller shutter behind it, hardware close-up of motor bracket, roller-shutter bottom edge close-up. The lift spring is missing but only the broken side is photographed. With the v7.4 single-side fallback, the classifier should land on Security and request clarification rather than returning N/A. This pins the correct behaviour against future regressions.
